description: Tipos de cámara y lentes cinematográficas con modificadores de prompt para FLUX Dev

cameras.name: Wide Shot
cameras.prompt_fragment: wide shot, establishing shot, full environment visible, cinematic composition, 24mm lens

cameras.name: Close Up
cameras.prompt_fragment: close-up shot, intimate framing, subject fills frame, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field

cameras.name: Extreme Close Up
cameras.prompt_fragment: extreme close-up, macro photography, intricate detail, 100mm macro lens, razor-sharp focus

cameras.name: Bird's Eye
cameras.prompt_fragment: bird's eye view, overhead shot, top-down perspective, drone photography, aerial composition

cameras.name: Worm's Eye
cameras.prompt_fragment: worm's eye view, low angle shot, looking upward, dramatic perspective distortion, wide angle 14mm lens

cameras.name: Dutch Angle
cameras.prompt_fragment: dutch angle, canted framing, tilted horizon, psychological tension, disorienting composition

cameras.name: Over The Shoulder
cameras.prompt_fragment: over-the-shoulder shot, OTS framing, foreground subject silhouette, depth layering, 50mm lens

cameras.name: Anamorphic
cameras.prompt_fragment: anamorphic lens, ultra-wide cinematic aspect ratio, horizontal lens flares, oval bokeh, epic movie aesthetic

cameras.name: Tilt Shift
cameras.prompt_fragment: tilt-shift photography, selective focus plane, miniature effect, toy-like scale, blurred edges, architectural photography

cameras.name: Fish Eye
cameras.prompt_fragment: fisheye lens, 180-degree field of view, extreme barrel distortion, spherical warping, skateboard or action sport photography style

cameras.name: Long Exposure
cameras.prompt_fragment: long exposure photography, light trails, motion blur streaks, silky smooth water, night scene, 30 second exposure

cameras.name: Telephoto
cameras.prompt_fragment: telephoto lens, 400mm, compressed perspective, background compression, subject isolation, wildlife photography style

cameras.name: Bokeh Portrait
cameras.prompt_fragment: portrait photography, f/1.4 aperture, creamy bokeh background, subject in sharp focus, 85mm prime lens, studio lighting

cameras.name: Dolly Zoom
cameras.prompt_fragment: dolly zoom effect, vertigo shot, background expanding while subject stays same size, psychological disorientation, Hitchcock technique

cameras.name: POV Shot
cameras.prompt_fragment: point of view shot, first-person perspective, immersive camera angle, GoPro style, action camera, subjective viewpoint
